title: A query containing a where subclause returnning true, the query result is empty.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 DECIMAL(10,0), c1 FLOAT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (c1), UNIQUE (c1));
CREATE TABLE t1 (c0 FLOAT NOT NULL, c1 FLOAT DEFAULT NULL, c2 TEXT DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (c0), UNIQUE (c2, c1));
SELECT t0.c1, t1.c2 FROM t1, t0 WHERE (NOT ((t0.c1) >= (t1.c2)));
key_bug_features: Query with NOT condition returns empty result set
